/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -DTF_MAJOR_VERSION=2 -DTF_MINOR_VERSION=20 -DTF_PATCH_VERSION=0 -DTF_VERSION_SUFFIX="" -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libabsl_log_internal_conditions.so.2501.0.0 -o libabsl_log_internal_conditions.so.2501.0.0 CMakeFiles/log_internal_conditions.dir/internal/conditions.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN/../base:" ../base/libabsl_base.so.2501.0.0 ../base/libabsl_raw_logging_internal.so.2501.0.0 ../base/libabsl_log_severity.so.2501.0.0 ../base/libabsl_spinlock_wait.so.2501.0.0
